args.query:
SELECT ltrim(trim(o.OwnerId),'#') AS OwnerId,
       AVG(CAST(CAST(c.CompanySignedDate AS DATE) - CAST(o.CreatedDate AS DATE) AS DOUBLE)) AS avg_days,
       COUNT(*) AS opp_count
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN Contract c
  ON ltrim(trim(o.ContractID__c),'#') = ltrim(trim(c.Id),'#')
WHERE o.CreatedDate IS NOT NULL
  AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
  AND CAST(o.CreatedDate AS DATE) >= DATE '2023-04-01'
  AND CAST(o.CreatedDate AS DATE) < DATE '2023-05-01'
  AND CAST(c.CompanySignedDate AS DATE) >= CAST(o.CreatedDate AS DATE)
GROUP BY OwnerId
ORDER BY avg_days ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT ltrim(trim(o.OwnerId),'#') AS OwnerId,
       AVG(CAST(CAST(c.CompanySignedDate AS DATE) - CAST(o.CreatedDate AS DATE) AS DOUBLE)) AS avg_days,
       COUNT(*) AS opp_count
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN Contract c
  ON ltrim(trim(o.ContractID__c),'#') = ltrim(trim(c.Id),'#')
WHERE o.CreatedDate IS NOT NULL
  AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
  AND CAST(o.CreatedDate AS DATE) >= DATE '2023-04-01'
  AND CAST(o.CreatedDate AS DATE) < DATE '2023-05-01'
  AND CAST(c.CompanySignedDate AS DATE) >= CAST(o.CreatedDate AS DATE)
GROUP BY OwnerId
ORDER BY avg_days ASC
LIMIT 1;
